user_prompt: VIP customer is unhappy and said 'this is unacceptable.' Flag and draft an empathetic follow-up.
actual_output:
Priority: HIGH
Category: Escalation / Customer Success
Flag: VIP

Draft response:
Hi [Customer Name],

I am so sorry to hear about your recent experience, and I completely understand why you feel this is unacceptable. As one of our most valued customers, your experience is incredibly important to us, and I want to make this right immediately. 

Could you please share a few more details about the specific issue you ran into? I will personally oversee this ticket and work directly with our team to ensure it gets resolved as quickly as possible. 

Thank you for your patience while we get this sorted out for you. I am standing by for your reply.

Best,
Compass
OpenClaw Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly identified the request as a legitimate support task, applied the required triage formatting (Priority, Category, Flag), and provided an empathetic draft response as instructed.
